## Summary
<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (fixes a broken behaviour, no API change)
- [ ] New feature (adds new functionality, backwards compatible)
- [ ] Breaking change (changes existing API or behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactoring (no behaviour change)
- [ ] CI / build changes

## Related Issue
Closes # <!-- link the GitHub issue number, e.g. Closes #42 -->

## How Was This Tested?
- [ ] Added unit tests in `agentic-docs-core/src/test/`
- [ ] Manually tested against the sample app with OpenAI
- [ ] Manually tested against the sample app with Ollama
- [ ] No testing needed (docs / comment change only)

## Checklist
- [ ] `mvn verify` passes locally with no test failures
- [ ] New public methods and classes have Javadoc
- [ ] `application.properties` comments updated if new properties were added
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md` updated if the project structure changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow the Conventional Commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.)
